name: Melon Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil.
2. When the oil is hot, add the shallots and saute for 1 minute.
3. Add the diced honeydew melon and cantaloupe and continue sauteing for 1 minute.
4. Stir in the white wine and saute for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Remove from heat, season with salt and pepper, and stir in the mint.
6. Chill for 1 hour.
7. Pile the relish in the center of the plate.
8. Arrange the fried arugula around the relish.
9. Garnish with black pepper and chopped parsley.
